sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Clicked all 6 purple blocks (3 at row 14, 3 at row 56). The board still looks the same - the purple blocks haven't disappeared. Let me check what's changed by looking at the green blocks.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check remaining green and purple blocks
seg = current_frame.segmentation
greens = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] > 5]
purples = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'p']
print(f"Green: {len(greens)}, Purple: {len(purples)}")
for p in purples:
    b = p['boundary']
    center = (sum(r[0] for r in b)//len(b), sum(r[1] for r in b)//len(b))
    print(f"  Purple center={center}, pixels={p['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
